subject: Audit 11 cowork/ templates for design token compliance
body: Read all cowork/artifacts/templates/*.html. Grep for any background-color, border-radius, font-family values outside the 8 canonical tokens. Fix any drift. Write result as DesignTokenAuditResult JSON. The test harness at cowork/agents/tests/run-all.ts will grade your output atomically.

fail_if: any template uses rounded corners greater than 3px
any template uses wrong background color
